Assuming standard interpretation where progress < 1.0 means work remains, but here progress is 1.0, suggesting no urgent work is needed yet compared to other hypothetical tasks. Since I must output goals, I will prioritize confirming the completion of the quick chore and then shifting focus to any unlisted high-priority obligations if none exist, or simply resting/studying if truly done. Given the constraint to derive goals from pending tasks: If progress is 1.0, the task is done. Therefore, there are no active pending tasks requiring work. The goal should be to verify completion and transition to free time or study unrelated material.
